the flip does NOT hold at rate indices [1, 2, 3]: at every rate you need angle MSE invariant <= recon <= anti AND recon to have the smallest reconstruction energy. If this fails, your informative direction w_hat is likely wrong (it is NOT the signal subspace) or your arm variance allocation is off.

the flip does NOT hold at rate indices [0, 1, 2, 3]: at every rate you need angle MSE invariant <= recon <= anti AND recon to have the smallest reconstruction energy. If this fails, your informative direction w_hat is likely wrong (it is NOT the signal subspace) or your arm variance allocation is off.
